# duration

**Instance Property**

The duration of the media asset, if available.

## Declaration

```swift
var duration: CMTime { get set }
```

## Discussion

This value is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreMedia/CMTime/invalid] if the duration isn’t available.

## Inspecting file properties

- **fragmentsStatus**: Indicates if the media asset contains fragments or is extendable by fragments.
- **MEFileInfo.FragmentsStatus**: An enumeration that describes if a media asset contains or supports fragments.
